subject: FW: JEffrey Epstein
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Peggy Siegal [mailto:Peggy@peggysiegal.com] 
Sent: Thursday, March 13, 2008 10:13 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: JEffrey Epstein



Just saw this- I am in London and will call on the morning- I am at
Claridge's...for a friend's birthday bash...then to LA on Monday for
meetings then Palm Beach for Easter and staying at the Koch's...peg

----- Original Message -----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: Peggy Siegal
Sent: Thu Mar 13 16:27:53 2008
Subject: JEffrey Epstein

Hello Peggy!  Jeffrey would like to speak with you!   Could you please
give him a call at our office (212 750 9895)



Thanks!  Lesley
